description: Use this API to print a report of machine loading and reactive power limit data (activity GCAP). Optionally, machine reactive power limits in the working case may be updated. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.0.0. ierr = gcap_2(sid, all, opt)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid subsystem identifier. valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. subsystem sid must have been previously defined. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: All buses or specified subsystem flag. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: opt
parameters.description: Update var limits option. (input; 0 by default).

all.description: process only buses in subsystem SID.

opt.description: update var limits in the working case.

error_codes.description: capability curve data has not been read into this case.
invalid SID value or subsystem SID is not defined.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
